name: Checkmate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the white cake batter using 2 (13x9-inch) pans of Trudy Reynolds' original recipe or 2 (18 1/4-ounce) boxes of white cake mix, following package directions.
2. Frost the tops of both white cakes with white icing and the brownies with dark chocolate icing.
3. Frost the sides of the white cake with remaining dark icing.
4. Cut the brownie and remaining white cake into 2-inch squares.
5. Arrange the frosted squares on top of the cake in a chessboard pattern.
6. Pipe additional white icing into the cracks between the squares using a pastry bag.
21 servings. Each serving contains:
- 663 calories
- 461 mg sodium
- 80 mg cholesterol
- 29 grams fat
- 103 grams carbohydrates
- 5 grams protein
- 1.22 grams fiber
White Icing:
- 1/2 cup (1 stick) butter, room temperature
- 4 cups powdered sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
- 1/4 to 1/3 cup whipping cream
Brownies:
- 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) butter
- 1/4 pound unsweetened baking chocolate
- 2 cups sugar
- 3 eggs
- 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
- 1 cup flour
Dark Chocolate Icing:
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 9 ounces semisweet chocolate pieces
- 3/4 cups whipping cream
- 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
- 3 cups powdered sugar
